criteria.budget: at least one update emitted before audio feed completes
criteria.measured: all 9 speech clips emitted first update before audio end
criteria.name: Streaming behavior
First-update latency median ≤ 200ms
criteria.notes: Time from session start (first audio buffer fed) to first update emission

criteria.name: Inter-update p95 ≤ 400ms
criteria.notes: Gap between consecutive isConfirmed=true updates; drives widget refresh cadence

criteria.budget: 0 updates on silence_only clips (or 1 empty end-of-stream token)
criteria.name: Silence handling
VAD heuristic accuracy ≥ 90%
criteria.notes: Heuristic: no update for >300ms → silence. Ground truth: 3 silence windows per clip.

criteria.budget: confidence (0.0-1.0) populated ≥95% of updates; isConfirmed present
criteria.measured: 34/34 updates have confidence; median conf=0.94; 21 confirmed, 13 unconfirmed
criteria.name: Confidence score + isConfirmed accessible
criteria.notes: FluidAudio 0.14.7 exposes SlidingWindowTranscriptionUpdate.confidence: Float (0-1). Anton's Q2/Q3 answer that 'no per-token confidence exists' was based on TiltTalk's wrapper abstraction, not FluidAudio's raw API. Actual API has confidence.

criteria.budget: ≥ 1 update per clip; recognisable speech in first 2 updates
criteria.measured: cafe_noise_pods: 3 updates — sample: "Play confine noise, YouTube click from y"; "YouTube clip from the iPhone to another " | cafe_noise_mac: 3 updates — sample: "Play cafe noise YouTube clip from your p"; "conversational but low volume for 30 sec"
criteria.name: Cafe noise resilience
criteria.notes: Qualitative spot-check; WER not computed at spike scope.

criteria.name: Memory footprint ≤ 200 MB
criteria.notes: TiltTalk measured 116 MB on iOS. macOS baseline may differ.

criteria.budget: incremental updates during audio (not batched at end)
criteria.name: Real-world cross-validation

verdictReasons: C4 First-update latency median ≤ 200ms: FAIL — 18424ms median across 9 clips
C5 Inter-update p95 ≤ 400ms: FAIL — 20761ms p95 across 21 gaps
C8 VAD heuristic accuracy ≥ 90%: FAIL — 2/6 windows detected (33%)
